payload.answer: I concluded that Brain is the source-of-truth personal memory system, and Cognee is a rebuildable projection layer that derives from Brain but does not override it.

entity_resolution.reason: Clarified hierarchical and functional distinction between Brain (source-of-truth) and Cognee (rebuildable projection) based on fixture records.

memory_cards.statement: Brain is the source-of-truth personal memory system, while Cognee is a rebuildable projection layer that derives from Brain but does not override it.
